
```{r, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
## Load libraries.
library(boot)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
## Import functions and variables.
source('src/confusion_matrix.R', local = confusion <- new.env())
source('src/bootstrapped_ci.R', local = bootstrapped <- new.env())
source('src/comparison.R', local = comparison <- new.env())
source('src/print_table.R', local = print <- new.env())
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
## Combine dataframe with measured outcome.

discordance_status <- left_join(
  parameters$original_data %>% 
    select(
      all_of(parameters$identifier),
      all_of(parameters$model_outcome)
    ),
  parameters$discordance_data,
  by = parameters$identifier
)
```

## Calculate confusion matrix derived measures.

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
bootstrapped_performance_measures <- 
  discordance_status %>%
  group_split(laboratory) %>%
  set_names(unique(discordance_status[["laboratory"]])) %>%
  purrr::map(
    function(x){
      boot(
        x,
        confusion$get_summmary_performance_measures_as_vector,
        parameters$bootstrap_number_of_samples,
        outcome = parameters$model_outcome, 
        outcome_class_TRUE = parameters$model_outcome_class_TRUE
      )
    }
  )
```

- Table with  bootstrapped summary statistics.
```{r, echo=FALSE}
bootstrapped_ci_performance_measures <<- bootstrapped$get_bootstrapped_ci_all_laboratories(
  bootstrapped_performance_measures,
  confusion$get_variable_names_from_summmary_performance_measures_as_vector(
    discordance_status,
    parameters$model_outcome, 
    parameters$model_outcome_class_TRUE
  ), 
  parameters$bootstrap_confidence_level, 
  parameters$bootstrap_methods
)

write.csv(
  bootstrapped_ci_performance_measures,
  parameters$path_and_name_stats_with_ci,
  row.names = FALSE
)

print$print_table_bootstrapped_summary(bootstrapped_ci_performance_measures, 4)
```

- Compact table with summary statistics.
```{r, echo=FALSE}
summary_performance_measures <- bootstrapped$get_dataframe_without_ci(bootstrapped_ci_performance_measures)

write.csv(
  summary_performance_measures,
  parameters$path_and_name_stats_without_ci,
  row.names = FALSE
)

print$print_table_summary(summary_performance_measures, 4)
```

- Histogram of auroc:
```{r, echo=FALSE}
histogram_auroc <- comparison$get_histogram(
  summary_performance_measures, 
  "auroc",
  "Area under the receiver operating characteristic curve",
  parameters$histogram_method,
  parameters$histogram_method_label,
  parameters$histogram_auroc_binwidth,
  parameters$histogram_auroc_x_range,
  parameters$histogram_auroc_y_range
)

plot(histogram_auroc)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
distribution_auroc <- comparison$get_distribution_table(
  summary_performance_measures, 
  "auroc", 
  "laboratory"
)

comparison$print_datatable_distribution(distribution_auroc, 4)
```

- Histogram of sensitivity:
```{r, echo=FALSE}
histogram_sensitivity <- comparison$get_histogram(
  summary_performance_measures, 
  "sensitivity",
  "Sensitivity (%)",
  parameters$histogram_method,
  parameters$histogram_method_label,
  parameters$histogram_sensitivity_binwidth,
  parameters$histogram_sensitivity_x_range,
  parameters$histogram_sensitivity_y_range
)

plot(histogram_sensitivity)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
distribution_sensitivity <- comparison$get_distribution_table(
  summary_performance_measures, 
  "sensitivity", 
  "laboratory"
)

comparison$print_datatable_distribution(distribution_sensitivity, 4)
```

- Histogram of percentage discordant:
```{r, echo=FALSE}
histogram_specificity <- comparison$get_histogram(
  summary_performance_measures, 
  "specificity",
  "specificity",
  parameters$histogram_method,
  parameters$histogram_method_label,
  parameters$histogram_specificity_binwidth,
  parameters$histogram_specificity_x_range,
  parameters$histogram_specificity_y_range
)

plot(histogram_specificity)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
distribution_specificity <- comparison$get_distribution_table(
  summary_performance_measures, 
  "specificity", 
  "laboratory"
)

comparison$print_datatable_distribution(distribution_specificity, 4)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
## Save plots.
saveRDS(histogram_auroc, parameters$path_and_name_histogram_auroc)
saveRDS(histogram_sensitivity, parameters$path_and_name_histogram_sensitivity)
saveRDS(histogram_specificity, parameters$path_and_name_histogram_specificity)
```
